column1: # Sample user accounts created on first boot.
#   - email     : email address (auto-confirmed; no real mail sent)
#   - password  : login password (all sample accounts use 'password')
#   - groups    : comma-separated group IDs to add the user to
#                 Members of group 3 (Member) are added automatically by
#                 Flarum, so listing additional groups (like 4=Mod) here
#                 layers on top of the default Member membership.
# Note: 'admin' is created during `php flarum install` from install.yaml,
# so it is NOT listed here.
# Imported by scripts/seed-discussions.php (also referenced as authors of
